  def sieve(max)

  sum_b = 0

    if is_prime[i]
      sum_a += num
    else
      sum_b += num
    end
  end
  (sum_a - sum_b).abs
end
```

def solve(nums)
  max_index = nums.length - 1
  is_prime = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
  is_prime[0] = is_prime[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_index)).each do |i|
    if is_prime[i]
      (i*i..max_index).step(i) do |j|
        is_prime[j] = false
      end
    end
  end
  sum_a = 0
  sum_b = 0
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    if is_prime[i]
      sum_a += num
    else
      sum_b += num
    end
  end
  (sum_a - sum_b).abs
end
